title: OpenAI Deep Research: Atlas Expansion Decision

sections.title: External opportunity
sections.text: Atlas Analytics reported 24% annual demand growth in the target segment, but the report cannot establish Atlas's approved investment budget or internal delivery capacity.

sections.title: Execution risk
sections.text: The implementation benchmark warned that expansion programs risk delay when ownership and security approvals remain unresolved.

claims.text: The market benchmark reported 24% annual demand growth for the target segment.

citations.title: Target Segment Market Benchmark
citations.quote: The market benchmark reported 24% annual demand growth for the target segment.

claims.text: The implementation benchmark reported that unresolved security approval can delay expansion by twelve weeks.
